display.purpose: Screen titles. One per screen. Set heavy and tight.

title.purpose: Card titles and list item primary labels.

body.purpose: Post content, descriptions, input values. Max ~60 chars per line.

micro.purpose: Chips, tags, status badges only. Never at body length.

motion.name: press-in
motion.purpose: All tappable cards and buttons on press. The only tactile metaphor in the system.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Colour transitions (active tab, focus border, chip selection).

motion.name: screen-entry
motion.purpose: Fragment/screen entry. Subtle vertical rise. Never horizontal slides.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Golden-hour fill, deep-bark text. The main action on any screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #D4A832; color: #130F0B; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 14px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0.0, 0.2, 1), background 180ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #EDD07A; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); background: #C49822; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D4A832; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Ember-card fill with warm-cream text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #252018; color: #F2EDE6; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; padding: 14px 24px; border: 1px solid #332B1F; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0.0, 0.2, 1), border-color 180ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #7A7060; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D4A832; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Active Chip
components.description: Selected filter or active tab toggle. Golden-hour fill.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 8px; transition: background 180ms, color 180ms; } .ds-chip--active { background: #D4A832; color: #130F0B; } .ds-chip--inactive { background: #252018; color: #7A7060; }

components.name: Inactive Chip
components.description: Unselected filter state. Ember-card fill, warm-dust text.

components.name: Community Card
components.description: 2-column grid card for community discovery. Thumbnail bleeds edge-to-edge at top.
components.html:
Fitness

Morning Runners

1.2k members
components.css: .ds-card-community { background: #252018; border: 1px solid #332B1F; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0.0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card-community:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-card-community__thumb { aspect-ratio: 1; background: #0C1E35; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-card-community__chip { position: absolute; bottom: 8px; left: 8px; background: #261E0A; color: #F2EDE6; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.07em; padding: 3px 6px; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-card-community__info { padding: 12px; } .ds-card-community__name { color: #F2EDE6; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card-community__meta { color: #7A7060; font-size: 11px; margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-card-community__action { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 8px 14px; width: 100%; }

components.name: Feed Card
components.description: Variable-height image-forward card for the social feed. Height varies by image aspect ratio.
components.html:
@alex_runs

Day 47. 6am run in the cold and I can't believe I love it now.

❤ 34💬 8
components.css: .ds-card-feed { background: #252018; border: 1px solid #332B1F; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0.0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card-feed:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-card-feed__image-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-card-feed__image { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/5; object-fit: cover; display: block; } .ds-card-feed__scrim { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 56px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(19,15,11,0.85), transparent); display: flex; align-items: flex-end; padding: 8px 12px; } .ds-card-feed__username { color: #F2EDE6; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card-feed__body { padding: 10px 12px 12px; } .ds-card-feed__caption { color: #F2EDE6; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-feed__meta { display: flex; gap: 16px; color: #7A7060; font-size: 11px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input. Ember-card fill, ember-border stroke, golden-hour focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #252018; color: #F2EDE6; font-size: 13px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid #332B1F; border-radius: 10px; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 180ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7A7060; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #D4A832; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Semantic badge for community status: open, requesting, admin.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-badge--open { background: #0E2E1C; color: #3ECC7F; } .ds-badge--request { background: #2C1608; color: #F07D3C; } .ds-badge--admin { background: #131428; color: #7B86F4; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: 5-tab bottom nav bar. Active tab in golden-hour, inactive in warm-dust. No indicator pills.
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: flex; background: #130F0B; border-top: 1px solid #332B1F; padding: 8px 0 12px; } .ds-bottom-nav__item { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: none; border: none; color: #7A7060; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 0; transition: color 180ms; } .ds-bottom-nav__item--active { color: #D4A832; font-weight: 700; } .ds-bottom-nav__item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D4A832; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
HabitU is a dark editorial journal, not a neon fitness app. The visual system is built from warm charcoal surfaces — deep bark blacks, amber card layers, ember borders — lit by a single signature accent the colour of golden-hour light caught mid-run. The feed feels like flipping through a beautifully kept record of who you are becoming: image-forward, varied, alive with real content.

The system draws from two references held in tension. From Pinterest: image-first discovery, masonry rhythm, editorial hierarchy. From Strava: earned achievement, athletic restraint, social proof without vanity metrics.

This system explicitly rejects neon fitness app energy, corporate wellness softness, gamification clichés, and generic Material Design defaults.
keyCharacteristics: Warm dark surfaces — charcoal tinted toward brown, never cold blue-black
One earned accent — amber-gold appears only where it means something
Image-forward layouts with deliberate height variation
Weight contrast over size contrast for typographic hierarchy
Flat elevation expressed through tonal warmth, never drop shadows
Motion that feels satisfying, not busy — press scales, entry fades, completion moments

rules.name: The Golden Hour Rule
rules.body: The amber accent is used exclusively on earned or active states. It never appears as decoration. Its rarity is its authority.

rules.name: The Cold-Free Rule
rules.body: No pure blacks, no cool greys, no blue-shifted neutrals outside the semantic violet. If a surface reads cooler than ember-card, replace it.

rules.name: The Weight Gap Rule
rules.body: Adjacent text roles must differ by at least 200 weight points or 3sp in size.

rules.name: The Micro Exception
rules.body: The 9sp micro size is valid only in chips, tags, and badges. Never shrink body copy to fit a container.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: cardElevation is 0dp everywhere. If a component needs to feel elevated, the solution is a warmer background, not a shadow.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Surface stack: deep-bark → warm-coal → ember-card → warm-cream content. Never invert this order.

dos: Do warm every neutral toward brown, not blue.
Do vary feed card heights deliberately — identical-height cards betray the system.
Do use golden-hour only on earned or active states.
Do use weight contrast (900 vs 400) as the primary hierarchy tool.
Do let images bleed to card edges on feed cards.
Do apply scale_press (0.97, 120ms) to every tappable card and button.
Do use ember-signal (#F07D3C) for attention states — it harmonises with the warm palette.
Do test new screens against the Cold-Free Rule.
donts: Don't use the legacy lime #C8F53B as primary accent — golden-hour (#D4A832) is the evolved form.
Don't use #000000 or #FFFFFF. Use deep-bark and warm-cream respectively.
Don't build identical card grids — vary height, image ratio, and content density.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1dp as a coloured accent stripe.
Don't apply gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Don't reach for modals when a bottom sheet or inline expansion works.
Don't use corporate wellness palettes (Calm/Headspace soft pastels).
Don't use text_dim (#9CA0CC) or card_dark (#161929) — legacy cold values, scheduled for removal.
Don't put golden-hour on decorative elements.
